requested_items.objective: Run the q8 reciprocal-normalization frontier grid on the broader distribution dataset, compare the measured bf16 reciprocal anchor against q8 exact and q8 reciprocal q10/q12/q14/q16 under distribution shift, and keep PPA ranking grounded in merged Nangate45 datapath metrics.

expected_result.reason: Broader distribution evidence should validate whether the measured bf16 timing advantage and q8 reciprocal tradeoff remain quality-safe beyond the prompt-stress setup.
